product.title: Maybelline Super Stay Lumi-Matte Foundation, Lightweight and Buildable Full Coverage Foundation Makeup For Up To 30HR Wear, 120, 1 Count
featureBullets: Light As Air Make Up Feel: Super Stay Up to 30HR Lumi Matte Foundation delivers buildable full coverage that lasts all day. Achieve a flawless base that feels like nothing on skin. Say goodbye to flat looking skin & look lit-from-within

Longwear Liquid Foundation Formula: Infused with amino acids to deliver a matte finish with a hint of luminosity. Our formula's flexible film resists sweat, water & transfer for all day shine control. Stay flawless no matter what the day has in store

Available In 24 Shades: This Maybelline foundation is available in 24 luminous matte face makeup shades. Our light as air makeup foundation formula blends in seamlessly, delivering a natural matte finish with a hint of luminosity

Maybelline Has What You Need: Create any look with foundation, BB cream, concealer and highlighter for the perfect canvas, eye shadow, brow pencil, mascara and eyeliner for any eye look and lip products, from matte lipstick to au natural lip gloss
Photos are taken under studio lighting conditions, the actual product may differ from the images shown. Images are for illustrative purposes only.
product.description: Introducing Super Stay Up to 30HR Lumi-Matte Foundation, Maybelline New York’s airy longwear foundation designed for every and any occasion! This longwear, breathable foundation delivers up to 30HR of light as air coverage that feels super comfortable on skin. Infused with amino acids for a luminous matte finish. Lightweight formula adjusts to skin and resists sweat, water and transfer. Get the lumi-matte look: Matte with a hint of luminosity, and never look flat again! Available in 24 shades. Vegan formula. Non-comedogenic. Dermatologically tested for safety. Suitable for all skin types, even sensitive skin.

specification.value: Long-wearing, full coverage with shine control
#3,000 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #34 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation provides good buildable coverage and lasts all day without getting cakey or oily. Moreover, the product receives positive feedback for its lightweight feel, smooth application with a foundation brush, and natural-looking finish that looks great even after 6 hours. Additionally, they appreciate its quality, comparing it favorably to high-end foundations, and consider it excellent value for money. However, the color match receives mixed reviews, with some customers finding it perfect for their skin tone while others say it's too dark.

reviews.reviewTitle: SO, SO Good! BEST DRUGSTORE FOUNDATION
reviews.reviewText: I LOVE THIS FOUNDATION! I have dry skin and always do my skin care routine prior to putting on my makeup. I have curated a routine that keeps me hydrated and plays well with ALL makeup. I have been wearing Haus Labs Triclone foundation for years, but my skin is fairer than it normally is (I live in the desert and am inside all Summer) and figured I'd try this foundation as opposed to trying to figure out my new shade in Haus Lab's 65 shade options (they have a VERY confusing skin tone format). I found 118 perfect for my light/neutral skin tone. This foundation is JUST AS GOOD as any foundation you can find in Sephora. I have tried SO many foundations, and this goes on smoothly, covers well, and like the Triclone, keeps a skin-like finish. I will say that it dries down quickly so there is not a lot of time for placement. Do not pump this on your face and blend section at a time (NOBODY should be pumping foundation on their face) because it dries fast. I pump two pumps it into my hand, dip my brush in and work section at a time, then repeat the process till my face is covered. This LASTS ALL DAY, doesn't budge once it's dried, and withstands sweat, the heat, and a full day of activities. I would say this reminds me of a combination of Triclone Foundation and Estee Lauder Double wear. The LUMI-MATTE finish is muah! CHEF'S KISS. Since I use a moisturizing skin care routine, oftentimes a luminous foundation can be too much glow for my taste. Then I have to powder more heavily than I like, then it's too matte and I need to use a hydrating setting spray and lumi blush. It's a vicious cycle. This dries and has a soft, illumination to it but it also dries to be a matte finish. How? IDK! I end up powdering ONLY where I use concealer and this gives me that perfect finish I am after. This NEVER ends up being too luminous for me. I think anyone can pull this foundation off, oily or dry. I think this would be AWESOME for oily skin people who want to wear a lumi foundation but can't without over-powdering the face. They probably need to make more shades of this line because as it stands, there aren't enough to cover every skin tone, and they need to. I predict that this, along with the Super Stay Skin Tint, will be a part of Maybelline's permanent collection. I used to use the Eraser foundation for years, but this is much better as it stays put ALL DAY LONG. I'm so glad I tried this as it has become my go-to foundation I wear everyday now. If you have dry skin, do not skip your moisturizing routine prior to wearing this as I could foresee it becoming patchy and dry looking. For oily skin people, I think a grippy primer like Elf Power Grip or Maybelline Grippy primer would work well under this. I have Milk Makeup Hydro-Grip and I haven't tried it with that yet, but I will and follow up with my results! Maybelline and L'oreal have been killing it lately! They keep this up and I won't ever have to step into a Sephora again!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 7, 2025

reviews.reviewText: This is the absolute best foundation EVER!!!! It’s the perfect shade for my skin tone, it blends so easy & well. I’ve used Fit Me Dewy & Smooth for years until I tried Lumi Matte and now there’s no going back. It has a nice scent, not too thick at all and not too drying which is extremely important for my usually dry skin. Perfect age defying formula: doesn’t set into wrinkles. I use it with the Grippy primer and it lasts 24 hours for sure with little touch up required. Beats out high end brands effortlessly.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 23, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Why did you pick this product vs others?: I have mature skin. That is, I never took care of it, tanned way too much, etc. In the last couple of years, I've noticed my pores are appearing larger. I have been trying multiple foundations that are advertised as for "mature skin" or "color-matching", only to be disappointed. I saw this Maybelline Super Stay Lumi-Matte Foundation reviewed on quite a few websites and I figured, what do I have to lose? Other foundations that I have tried just did not look right because of color or, worse yet, settling into wrinkles. I am so happy that I gave this foundation a try. I have slightly olive-toned skin and did not want a "pinkish" tone so I chose the #129 - Neutral Cool color. It was a perfect match!!! It seemed to go on light but then develops to a more natural (and not pink) tint. As I said, I have "mature skin" and have developed deep smile lines and moderate crows feet. This foundation, paired with Maybelline Super Stay Liquid Concealer (SS Concealer #30) and Rimmel London Stay Matte - 003 - Primer has made a huge difference with those smile lines and the crows feet are now barely visible. I put a dab or two onto a makeup disk and then apply the foundation with a brush and it goes on smoothly. The liquid is not too thick & not too thin. But, the thing that I am most happy with is that it is a perfect match for my skin color. As I said, the color/tint appears light when you first apply it so, don't keep applying more. It'll change. You can build on it, though. I have not needed to. It seems to last about 10-12 hours without needing any correction. With it's matte finish, it does not look like I have foundation plastered over my entire face. It evens out my ruddy skin to a perfect finish and tone. The only thing that I do not like is the bottle's cap. It feels pretty fragile to me. I truly wish I that I had found this earlier. I am so happy with the color match and the final matte appearance.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on June 25, 2025

reviews.reviewText: The Maybelline Super Stay 30H Lumi Matte Foundation is a strong contender in the world of long-wear drugstore foundations — especially for those who want that elusive balance of a matte finish that doesn’t look flat or feel drying. Right off the bat, the formula impresses with how lightweight it feels on the skin. Despite offering solid medium-to-full coverage, it doesn’t cake or cling to texture. It spreads smoothly, blends easily (whether with a brush, sponge, or fingers), and sets to a velvety matte finish that still allows a bit of natural radiance to shine through — a big win for those who want a matte look without sacrificing a healthy glow. What really sets this foundation apart is its incredible staying power. It truly lives up to the “Super Stay” name, holding up beautifully through long days, heat, humidity, and even light sweat. It doesn’t break apart in oily areas or cling to dry patches, and minimal touch-ups are needed — if any. It stays comfortable and breathable for hours, even when layered or worn under a mask. The only drawback? The shade range is limited, especially compared to other modern foundations. While the available shades work for light to medium skin tones fairly well, deeper and ultra-fair tones may struggle to find a good match. This is a noticeable gap in an otherwise excellent formula.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on April 30, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Maybelline Super Stay Lumi Matte Foundation provides really good coverage while still looking natural. It blends easily, feels lightweight, and gives a smooth luminous matte finish. The coverage is buildable, so it works well for both everyday makeup and full glam looks. It stays in place for long hours without feeling heavy or cakey, and the shade 112 looks great on my skin. For the quality and performance, the price is excellent. A reliable foundation that delivers great coverage and long wear.

reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in Saudi Arabia on November 15, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Honestly, this is such a great foundation. It’s become a total staple in my collection and has officially replaced my previous high-end go-tos. The shade match is spot on, and the formula is beautiful. It's smooth, blendable, and super easy to apply with either a brush or sponge. It layers well with my skincare and mix-ins like facial oil or bronzing drops, and both cream and powder products sit perfectly on top. I have normal-to-oily skin, and it really holds up throughout the day without breaking apart or settling. I’ve worn it for 12–14 hour workdays and it still looks great with minimal touch-ups. As someone who’s mostly worn high-end foundations for years, I’m genuinely impressed with this one and would highly recommend it.

This foundation formula is magic! My very textured skin looks so much smoother with this on and it lasts longer than any other foundation I've tried. I have oily acne prone skin that gets dry patches and irritation due to dry climate and tretinoin but this foundation always looks good. Good coverage, and is lightweight. My only thing is that lightest shade 102 isn't quite light enough for me unfortunately especially in the winter, and it can pull a little orange when it oxidizes. I really hope Maybelline can add a few more shades!

I work out in the morning, my gym sessions are 2hrs long with cardio and weights, and this foundation looked seamless still. It's super lightweight, I contacted customer service at Maybelline cuz I thought mine was suspiciously water-like, and it sits super smooth on my face. It's so so worth it and it doesn't break me out or make my face feel all heavy.
